title: Silky Romantic Vietnamese Oyster Mushroom Pho
description: A plant-based, herbal, and silky Vietnamese dish featuring oyster mushrooms, perfect for a romantic evening. This pho is pressure-cooked to bring out the deep flavors of the mushrooms and spices.
instructions: In a pressure cooker, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the star anise, cinnamon stick, and vegetable broth to the pressure cooker.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then close the lid and pressure-cook for 10 minutes.
While the broth is cooking, prepare the rice noodles according to package instructions.
Add the sliced oyster mushrooms to the pressure cooker and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in the soy sauce and lime juice.
To assemble the pho, place the cooked noodles in a bowl, then add the hot broth and mushrooms.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
